<think> The World Wrestling Federation (WWF, now WWE) is a professional wrestling promotion. No Mercy was a pay-per-view event produced by the WWF. The event took place on May 16, 1999. Manchester Victoria station is a railway station in Manchester, England. Air rights refer to the space above a property that can be developed. Indoor arenas are large enclosed structures for sports and entertainment. I need to find the name of the specific indoor arena where this event took place. </think>

<answer> Manchester Evening News Arena </answer>

<think> Manchester Evening News Arena, also known as the M.E.N. Arena or the Manchester Arena, is a large indoor arena located above Manchester Victoria station. It has been the venue for various concerts, sports events, and other entertainment shows, including the WWF's No Mercy pay-per-view event on May 16, 1999. </think>

<answer> Manchester Evening News Arena </answer>
